---
description: "Tighten vague project requirements into a clearer, testable short list. Use when the project idea exists but the must-haves, out-of-scope items, or success checks are still fuzzy."
name: "Tighten Requirements"
argument-hint: "Project idea or vague requirement"
agent: "agent"
---

Read [requirements](../../docs/requirements.md).

Then help the user turn the current idea into sharper requirements:
- identify vague or missing parts
- suggest clearer must-have features
- suggest one or two things the first version should deliberately leave out
- suggest success checks that could actually be tested
- keep it brief enough to copy into the requirements file
